reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body: This school will make your ward follow ridiculous and senseless rules in the name of discipline which if the students violet will get punished, humiliated by the teachers and will be said mean things and when parents will question them about it they will either reply ohh we were just telling him not to do it again and sugarcoat them or will just ignore and after it the teachers would start targeting the student and harras them so much so your child's mental health, emotional health and happiness will be all gone and ruined,and if by any chance they take stand for themselves after all this they will be give the title characterless and ill mannered and also if something is done by teachers no action will be taken and instead students will get blamed resulting in them getting punished by getting their events and sports or extra curricular cancel ESPR FOR GIRLS YOU WILL GET ASHAMED FOR YOUR LOOKS AND WILL BE CALLED CHARACTERLESS IF YOU WILL MAKE ONE PONY TAIL,THEY DON'T FOCUS IN GIRLS IN SPORTS AT ALL only few kids will be selective in all things and the whole school system works of discrimination and being biased and they then name it discipline rules and good behaviour teacher not all are poilet neither they teach well except one or two(soina ma'am of ssc and bhawna ma'am of science)are the only good teachers in the school(monica of english,yogita of Hindi) are once who will hit you so much so you will get blue spots or swelling. And I have so much more but even after all this you want your child to be in school sorry but they will be nothing but dead or high chances that they will do self harm

reviews.review_body: Well discipline and study another school 👍🏻👍🏻

reviews.author: Mili Gupta
reviews.review_body: Poor school, worst management, doesnt attend parents properly , please do not put your kid in such unethical school.

reviews.author: Monita Rathee
reviews.review_body: Best school in Faridabad..really admirable and exclusive learning environment.

reviews.author: Sandeep Kumar
reviews.review_body:
Hi All,

For this school my 1st impression  is worst never treated like the staff of school treated with my Wife for the 1st time. I want to give 0/10 but can't give so the genuine review is 1/10 because everyone know the value of behaviour which is very Important and the staff was very rude when wife asked about the school. The receptionist just give the form to fill and nothing information shared by her. My wife want to know the the basics for nursery kid like how they treat, how they ready kids for their better  future, also the activities school are providing to the kids..Let me explain you as per my understanding the school is the 1st place where we start our life as like blank paper and this is the school responsibilities to make a person better for their whole life and fill the blank paper for the kids better future but this school staff don't have the manners to treat their parents in good way in a appropriate way...Others recognised school are ready to give addmission in Nursery to my Daughter but the shared the form and say 50000/- addmission fees nothing else the staff receptionist share with my Wife...is this the way to treat with parents...all the schools are sharing the good things about school achievements how they approach a kids and what they are doing for their better carrer....

I want to write more things but if was their then definitely explain the things in a better way...

Staff is rediculas

Needa answer on this review

Regards
Sandeep Kumar
